diagrams.title: TCP Segment Header Structure
diagrams.description: Shows all fields of TCP header with bit positions and sizes from 0 to 31 for each row
elements: Data Offset (0-3), Reserved (4-9), Flags (10-15), Window Size (16-31)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize TCP header field arrangement and understand minimum 20-byte, maximum 60-byte structure

diagrams.title: TCP Three-Way Handshake
diagrams.description: Sequence diagram showing connection establishment with SYN, SYN-ACK, ACK segments
elements: Server responds SYN-ACK (seq=300, ack=101, SYN=1, ACK=1)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how TCP establishes connection and synchronizes sequence numbers

diagrams.title: TCP Flags Position in Header
diagrams.description: Shows 6-bit control flags field position (bits 10-15) in header with individual flag locations
diagrams.purpose: Memorize flag positions and understand which bits are set for different TCP operations
